dialogue_text: That you will be thrown to the wild calots [dogs] in the great arena as soon as the hordes have assembled for the yearly games.

dialogue_text: you are a Thark, but you hate and loathe the customs of your people as much as we do. Will you not accompany us in one supreme effort to escape? I am sure that Dejah Thoris can offer you a home and protection among her people, and your fate can be no worse among them than it must ever be here.
